note: Value-add STACKED on the binary funnel (per user steer: nothing beats binarization QPS, so stack on it). Same rotated binary scan; plain exact rerank vs ADSampling-pruned rerank (rotated f32, early-terminate candidates that can't beat the k-th). Gain GROWS with C (rerank's share grows): +5% @ C=1000, +6% @ C=2000, +10% @ C=4000, near-lossless at eps0=2.1 (recall -0.001). eps0=1.5 = +14% @ C=4000 at recall 0.99. Lets the funnel afford a higher C (more recall) without rerank cost growing linearly. Untiled here for a clean scan-matched comparison.
